code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has and not neg
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        let v = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      end
      cur = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sum = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while j < m
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + v
    if j == 0
      out = "#{sum}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
